contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Treasury breakdown endpoint: cache via PropertiesService (10x speedup)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/301
  
  Details:
  Operator observation: https://truesight.me/treasury/ loaded slowly. Timed it: 21.7s end-to-end vs 3.1s for the default performance-stats endpoint (~7x slowdown).
  
  Root cause: doGet?type=treasury_breakdown was running computeTreasuryBreakdown() live on every request — that calls SpreadsheetApp.openByUrl() for each AGL ledger (heavy auth+open per ledger), reads each Balance sheet, plus hits Solana RPC for USDT vault. Per page load.
  
  By contrast, the headline scalar USD_TREASURY_BALANCE doesn't suffer this — it's pre-computed on a cron schedule by updateUSD_TREASURY_BALANCE() and stored in the Performance Statistics sheet; doGet just reads the cached cell.
  
  Fix (option B from operator's two choices: ship cache-on-cron, not CacheService TTL-wrapper):
  
  1. cacheTreasuryBreakdown(breakdown) / readCachedTreasuryBreakdown() via PropertiesService.getScriptProperties() (KV store, no TTL, sub-second reads, no sheet pollution).
  
  2. updateUSD_TREASURY_BALANCE() refactored to call computeTreasuryBreakdown() ONCE instead of summing three component functions + logging each (which previously called each component twice). Scalar derives from breakdown.total_usd; structured breakdown cached as side effect. Same final number, same audit logs, but per-ledger AGL Balance-sheet reads run once not twice — cron is now ~50% faster too as a bonus.
  
  3. doGet treasury_breakdown branch reads cache first, falls back to live compute + cache-warm only on cold miss. Adds from_cache field to response for transparency.
  
  4. updateTreasuryBreakdown() standalone refresh — operator can warm the cache manually after a deploy or wire a separate trigger.
  
  Verification (live, post-deploy @8):
    Cold (cache miss, warms cache):  27.66s, from_cache=false
    Warm 1:                            2.86s, from_cache=true
    Warm 2:                            2.68s, from_cache=true
  
  total_usd preserved: 15619.03 — matches USD_TREASURY_BALANCE headline exactly.
  
  Side effect: the existing cron trigger that runs updateUSD_TREASURY_BALANCE() now also refreshes the breakdown cache automatically. No new trigger config required.
  
  PR: TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#301 (squash-merged 5ee6533; GAS deploy @8 at same URL)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
